items.title_en: Microsoft looked at buying Cursor before SpaceX deal, sources say
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，微软考虑在 SpaceX 交易之前收购 Cursor
items.desc_en: Prior to SpaceX's announcement that it's agreed to a potential purchase of Cursor, Microsoft looked at buying the AI coding startup.
items.desc_zh: 在 SpaceX 宣布同意收购 Cursor 之前，微软曾考虑收购这家人工智能编码初创公司。

items.title_en: Meta is tracking employee keystrokes on Google, LinkedIn, Wikipedia as part of AI training initiative
items.title_zh: 作为人工智能培训计划的一部分，Meta 正在跟踪员工在 Google、LinkedIn、Wikipedia 上的击键情况
items.desc_en: As part of an AI initiative that tracks employee keystrokes and mouse clicks, Meta is monitoring use of popular sites like Google, LinkedIn and Wikipedia.
items.desc_zh: 作为跟踪员工击键和鼠标点击的人工智能计划的一部分，Meta 正在监控 Google、LinkedIn 和 Wikipedia 等热门网站的使用情况。

items.title_en: Asia markets open higher as Iran ceasefire extension lifts mood
items.title_zh: 伊朗延长停火协议提振市场情绪，亚洲股市开盘走高
items.desc_en: Investors found some relief after Trump prolonged a ceasefire with Iran, sending U.S. stocks higher and setting up a positive open across Asia.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普延长与伊朗的停火协议后，美国股市走高，亚洲股市开盘积极，投资者稍稍松了口气。

items.title_en: Step aside Tesla, BYD: Japanese carmakers deepen their hold on India's auto market with hybrids
items.title_zh: 抛开特斯拉、比亚迪：日本汽车制造商通过混合动力车加深对印度汽车市场的控制
items.desc_en: In the world's third-largest auto market, demand for hybrid cars is racing ahead of EVs, deepening the hold of Japanese carmakers in India.
items.desc_zh: 在全球第三大汽车市场，对混合动力汽车的需求正在超过电动汽车，从而加深了日本汽车制造商在印度的影响力。

items.title_en: SK Hynix posts record first-quarter profit, in line with estimates as memory prices climb
items.title_zh: SK 海力士第一季度利润创历史新高，与内存价格上涨的预期一致
items.desc_en: SK Hynix posted yet another quarter of record profit and revenue, as prices for its products continue to surge amid strong AI demand.
items.desc_zh: SK 海力士在人工智能需求强劲的背景下，其产品价格持续上涨，季度利润和收入再次创下历史新高。

items.title_en: Inside the Massachusetts courtroom where former students face a teacher charged with rape - NBC News
items.title_zh: 在马萨诸塞州法庭内，前学生面对一名被指控强奸的老师 - NBC新闻

items.title_en: Mexico to beef up security at tourist sites after shooting at pyramids in lead up to World Cup - AP News

items.title_en: Trump's redistricting war leaves Republicans worse off - Axios
items.title_zh: 特朗普的选区重划战争让共和党的处境变得更糟 - Axios
items.desc_en: Trump's redistricting war leaves Republicans worse off  AxiosVirginia judge blocks redistricting referendum result that boosted Democrats' election hopes  CNBCHakeem Jeffries finally gets a signature
items.desc_zh: 特朗普的选区重新划分战争让共和党人处境更糟 Axios 弗吉尼亚州法官阻止了提振民主党选举希望的重新划分选区公投结果 CNBC 哈基姆·杰弗里斯 (Hakeem Jeffries) 终于获得了签名

items.title_en: AI is flattening the jobs market for young people, says Sunak
items.title_zh: 苏纳克表示，人工智能正在使年轻人的就业市场变得平坦
items.desc_en: The former prime minister said graduates' concerns about getting entry-level jobs are justified.
items.desc_zh: 这位前总理表示，毕业生对获得入门级工作的担忧是有道理的。

items.title_en: ServiceNow CEO downplays impact of Iran war and AI: 'Our business is doing great'
items.title_zh: ServiceNow 首席执行官淡化伊朗战争和人工智能的影响：“我们的业务做得很好”
items.desc_en: ServiceNow CEO Bill McDermott pushed back on concerns about the Iran war and AI disruption risks in an interview with CNBC's Jim Cramer.
items.desc_zh: ServiceNow 首席执行官 Bill McDermott 在接受 CNBC 的 Jim Cramer 采访时反驳了对伊朗战争和人工智能颠覆风险的担忧。

items.title_en: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Hits Record; Tesla Beats Expectations — Live Updates - WSJ
items.title_zh: 今日股市：标准普尔 500 指数创历史新高；特斯拉超出预期——实时更新 - 华尔街日报

items.desc_zh: 今日股市：标准普尔 500 指数创历史新高；特斯拉超出预期——实时更新 WSJ 特斯拉营收未达标，但利润好于汽车利润率，CNBC 财报公布后，特斯拉股价反转走低。

items.title_en: Virginia judge blocks redistricting referendum result that boosted Democrats' election hopes
items.title_zh: 弗吉尼亚州法官阻止重新划分选区的公投结果，该结果提振了民主党的选举希望
items.desc_en: Virginia voted by a slim margin on Tuesday to approve U.S. House district maps that could allow Democrats to flip four seats in the state this November.
items.desc_zh: 弗吉尼亚州周二以微弱优势投票批准了美国众议院选区地图，该地图可能允许民主党在今年 11 月更换该州的四个席位。

items.title_en: U.S. Navy Secretary John Phelan leaving Trump administration: Pentagon
items.title_zh: 五角大楼：美国海军部长约翰·费兰离开特朗普政府
items.desc_en: Secretary of the Navy John Phelan is leaving the Trump administration "effective immediately," a spokesman for the Department of Defense said.
items.desc_zh: 美国国防部发言人表示，海军部长约翰·费兰将“立即”离开特朗普政府。

items.title_en: Cassidy clashes with RFK Jr. on vaccines and abortion medicine - NBC News
items.title_zh: 卡西迪与小罗伯特·肯尼迪在疫苗和堕胎药物问题上发生冲突 - NBC 新闻
items.desc_en: Cassidy clashes with RFK Jr. on vaccines and abortion medicine  NBC NewsSenators grill RFK Jr. on vaccines, drug prices and more at hearing  NPRCombative, Defensive and Occasionally Contrite, Kennedy

items.title_en: ServiceNow stock sinks 14% as subscription revenue takes hit from Iran war
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争订阅收入受到打击，ServiceNow 股价下跌 14%
items.desc_en: The software company beat expectations for earnings and revenue as it continued to expand its artificial intelligence offerings.
items.desc_zh: 随着该软件公司继续扩大其人工智能产品，其盈利和收入超出了预期。

items.title_en: IBM shares turn lower as company beats but opts to maintain guidance
items.title_zh: IBM 股价走低，公司表现出色，但选择维持指引
items.desc_en: Investors have been attuned to mainframe disruption threats from artificial intelligence, but IBM posted 51% growth in Z mainframe hardware revenue.
items.desc_zh: 投资者已经适应了人工智能对大型机的破坏威胁，但 IBM 公布 Z 大型机硬件收入增长了 51%。

items.title_en: The much-hyped great rotation out of tech for 2026 may be over already
items.title_zh: 大肆宣传的 2026 年科技大轮换可能已经结束
items.desc_en: What had been the winners as investors moved money out of technology, are themselves now lagging as growth stocks regain favor.
items.desc_zh: 随着投资者将资金从科技领域转移出去，曾经的赢家现在却随着成长型股票重新受到青睐而落后。

items.title_en: Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat seeking his 13th term in Congress, dies at age 80
items.title_zh: 佐治亚州民主党众议员戴维·斯科特 (David Scott) 去世，享年 80 岁，正在寻求第 13 个国会任期
items.desc_en: U.S. Rep. David Scott, a Georgia Democrat and the first Black chairman of the House Agriculture Committee, has died at age 80.
items.desc_zh: 美国众议员戴维·斯科特 (David Scott) 去世，享年 80 岁，他是佐治亚州民主党人，也是众议院农业委员会第一位黑人主席。

items.title_en: Nigeria's suspected coup plotters deny treason charges
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚涉嫌政变策划者否认叛国罪指控
items.desc_en: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced last year when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.
items.desc_zh: 去年独立日游行被取消时，有关政变阴谋的指控首次浮出水面。

items.title_zh: 企业的关税退款程序已经开始。客户呢？ - 美国国家公共电台

items.title_zh: 教皇利奥在结束非洲之行时批评赤道几内亚监狱
items.desc_en: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.
items.desc_zh: 教宗发表了坦率而热情的讲话，这是他非洲之行的特色。

items.title_en: US and Iran in blockade standoff as Pakistan pushes for talks
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦推动谈判，美国和伊朗陷入封锁僵局
items.desc_en: The mood in the Strait of Hormuz remains combustible despite Trump's ceasefire extension.
items.desc_zh: 尽管特朗普延长了停火期限，霍尔木兹海峡的情绪仍然不稳定。

items.title_zh: 教皇利奥在结束非洲之行时批评赤道几内亚监狱 - BBC

items.title_en: Trump family's crypto firm sued over alleged 'extortion'
items.title_zh: 特朗普家族的加密货币公司因涉嫌“勒索”而被起诉
items.desc_en: Billionaire investor Justin Sun is suing the family's World Liberty crypto venture after spending $45m on its tokens.
items.desc_zh: 亿万富翁投资者贾斯汀·孙 (Justin Sun) 在花费 4500 万美元购买其家族的 World Liberty 加密货币公司的代币后，正在起诉该公司。

items.title_en: Tesla set to report first-quarter results after the bell
items.title_zh: 特斯拉将于盘后公布第一季度业绩
items.desc_en: Tesla's stock has underperformed all of its megacap peers so far this year as global competition ramps up in the electric vehicle market.
items.desc_zh: 随着电动汽车市场全球竞争的加剧，今年迄今为止，特斯拉的股价表现逊于所有大型同行。

items.desc_zh: 特朗普给伊朗几天时间提出和平提议 华尔街日报 对伊朗，特朗普首先眨眼延长停火 纽约时报 特朗普在停火撤退后寻求在伊朗问题上采取新的方针 特朗普称美国

items.title_en: No cartels involved - but Mexico's pyramid attack prompts new concerns
items.title_zh: 不涉及卡特尔——但墨西哥的金字塔袭击引发了新的担忧
items.desc_en: The deadly shooting at a popular tourist site weeks before the World Cup has rocked Mexico.
items.desc_zh: 世界杯前几周，一处热门旅游景点发生致命枪击事件，震惊了墨西哥。

items.title_en: Los Angeles becomes first major US school district to limit classroom screen time
items.title_zh: 洛杉矶成为美国第一个限制课堂屏幕时间的主要学区
items.desc_en: The school district, which serves about half a million students, is looking to reduce its reliance on devices after the pandemic.
items.desc_zh: 该学区为约 50 万学生提供服务，正在寻求在大流行后减少对设备的依赖。

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: EU prepares finalisation of Ukraine loan and new Russia sanctions, Cyprus says - Reuters
items.title_zh: 塞浦路斯称欧盟准备敲定乌克兰贷款和新的俄罗斯制裁 - 路透中文网
items.desc_en: EU prepares finalisation of Ukraine loan and new Russia sanctions, Cyprus says  ReutersEU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as pipeline is turned on ending deadlock  BBCHungary drops veto, clearing path
items.desc_zh: 塞浦路斯表示，欧盟准备敲定乌克兰贷款和新的俄罗斯制裁 路透社欧盟批准向乌克兰提供 900 亿欧元贷款，管道已开启，结束僵局 BBCH匈牙利放弃否决权，扫清道路

items.title_en: Mortgage rates sink again, and home buyers jump back in
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率再次下降，购房者重新涌入
items.desc_en: Mortgage demand continues to rebound as rates sink slightly lower.
items.desc_zh: 随着利率小幅下降，抵押贷款需求继续反弹。

items.title_en: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
items.title_zh: 由于燃油价格飙升，汉莎航空削减了 20,000 个夏季航班
items.desc_en: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.desc_zh: 由于美以与伊朗的战争导致航空燃油价格飙升，该航空公司是最新一家削减航班的航空公司。

items.title_en: EU decides on key €90bn Ukraine loan after pipeline deadlock ends
items.title_zh: 管道僵局结束后欧盟决定向乌克兰提供900亿欧元关键贷款
items.desc_en: The funding was agreed last December, but it has been held up in a row over Russian oil supplies to Hungary.
items.desc_zh: 这笔资金是去年12月达成的，但由于俄罗斯向匈牙利供应石油而被搁置。

items.title_en: US charges anti-extremism organisation over payments to informants in hate groups
items.title_zh: 美国指控反极端主义组织向仇恨团体的线人支付报酬
items.desc_en: The Southern Poverty Law Center said it would "vigorously defend ourselves, our staff, and our work".
items.desc_zh: 南方贫困法律中心表示将“大力捍卫我们自己、我们的员工和我们的工作”。

items.title_en: South Korean fighter jets collided due to pilots snapping pictures, report finds
items.title_zh: 报告发现，韩国战斗机因飞行员拍照而相撞
items.desc_en: One of the pilots has been fined thousands of dollars by the military to cover repair costs.
items.desc_zh: 其中一名飞行员被军方罚款数千美元，以支付维修费用。

items.title_en: Taiwan president cancels trip after African countries revoke flight permits
items.title_zh: 非洲国家吊销飞行许可 台湾总统取消行程
items.desc_en: Taiwan has accused Beijing of putting pressure on African countries to close their airspace to Lai's plane.
items.desc_zh: 台湾指责北京向非洲国家施压，要求其对黎智英的飞机关闭领空。

items.title_en: Thirteen killed in second India fireworks blast in three days
items.title_zh: 印度三天内第二次烟花爆炸造成13人死亡
items.desc_en: Earlier this week, an explosion at a firecracker factory in neighbouring state Tamil Nadu left at least 25 dead.
items.desc_zh: 本周早些时候，邻邦泰米尔纳德邦一家鞭炮工厂发生爆炸，造成至少 25 人死亡。

items.title_en: Phone tracking shows how Colombian mercenaries backed Sudan's RSF - report
items.title_zh: 电话追踪显示哥伦比亚雇佣军如何支持苏丹 RSF - 报告
items.desc_en: The Conflict Insights Group (CIG) says its research also shows the extent of UAE involvement.
items.desc_zh: 冲突洞察组织（CIG）表示，其研究还显示了阿联酋参与的程度。

items.title_en: Trump buys time for Iran deal after frantic day of diplomacy
items.title_zh: 经过一天的疯狂外交后，特朗普为伊朗协议争取了时间
items.desc_en: The US president's decision marked the second time in as many weeks he has backed off a threat to escalate the war, buying more time
items.desc_zh: 美国总统的决定标志着他在几周内第二次放弃了升级战争的威胁，从而赢得了更多时间

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Trump recounts Tim Cook call to 'kiss my ass,' in stark look at White House dealmaking
items.title_zh: 特朗普重述蒂姆·库克的“亲我屁股”呼吁，赤裸裸地看待白宫交易
items.desc_en: Tech executives from Amazon, Apple, Google and Meta have dined with Trump and donated millions to his inauguration fund and the White House ballroom.
items.desc_zh: 来自亚马逊、苹果、谷歌和 Meta 的科技高管曾与特朗普共进晚餐，并向他的就职基金和白宫宴会厅捐赠了数百万美元。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
